rendering_standard: SVG inline, viewBox 400x300 minimum, labeled with aria-label

visual_generators.description: Horizontal number line from −10 to 10 showing a starting point with an arrow indicating direction and magnitude of addition
visual_generators.usage: Static display only — shows the model; Mathlete computes the sum separately
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Never show the answer on the number line itself

visual_generators.description: Number line showing p − q as p + (−q) with two arrows: original position then additive inverse movement
visual_generators.usage: Conceptual model — paired with static MC questions about meaning

visual_generators.description: Rendered HTML table with x and y columns; one entry is missing — Mathlete identifies if proportional
visual_generators.usage: Proportional recognition task — paired with Group B static question

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane (first quadrant) with labeled axes and a line through origin; a specific point is highlighted
visual_generators.usage: Interpretation question — what does the highlighted point mean?

visual_generators.description: Labeled rectangle or L-shaped floor plan with scale ratio shown; dimensions labeled in scale units
visual_generators.usage: Generator — Mathlete computes actual length or area from scale

visual_generators.description: Two adjacent angles on a straight line (supplementary), one labeled with expression, one with question mark
visual_generators.usage: Generator — Mathlete solves for missing angle

visual_generators.description: Two angles forming a right angle (complementary), one labeled, one as ?
Two intersecting lines forming 4 angles; one labeled, three showing relationships (two vertical, two supplementary)
visual_generators.usage: Generator — Mathlete identifies and computes named angle

visual_generators.description: Two parallel lines cut by a transversal with all 8 angles numbered; one given, others as targets

svg_params.ask_for: specific angle by name or number

visual_generators.usage: Generator — Mathlete uses angle relationships to find target angle

visual_generators.description: Circle with labeled radius or diameter; used for area/circumference generator questions
visual_generators.usage: Generator visual — accompanies circle calculation generators

visual_generators.description: L-shape, T-shape, or rectangle-minus-cutout with all necessary dimensions labeled
visual_generators.usage: Generator visual — Mathlete decomposes and computes total area

visual_generators.description: Number line showing a solved inequality with open/closed circle and arrow direction
visual_generators.usage: Answer verification visual — displayed AFTER Mathlete submits answer; NOT shown as the question (to prevent answer leaking)

visual_generators.description: Side-by-side horizontal box plots for two data sets on the same number line axis
visual_generators.usage: Generator visual — Mathlete reads values and computes/compares IQR, median

visual_generators.description: Two-stage tree diagram for compound probability (e.g., flip coin then roll die); branches labeled with outcomes
visual_generators.usage: Static question visual — Mathlete counts outcomes from tree to find probability
